column12: A new law aimed at making it easier for people and businesses to follow government rules on taxes and other regulations, reducing the burden of paperwork and cost.

"explanation": "- This law makes it simpler for everyone to follow government rules (called compliance) when paying taxes and meeting other legal requirements.
